metadata.website_type: industrial wastewater treatment equipment company site

tasks.name: Request a quote for the cheapest DAF unit handling ≥50 m³/h under $80,000
tasks.description: Find dissolved air flotation (DAF) units, filter for at least 50 m³/h flow capacity and maximum price of $80,000, sort by price, and add the cheapest qualifying unit to the quote list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over or click "Equipment" and select "Primary Treatment" and then click on "Dissolved Air Flotation (DAF)".
In the filters sidebar, locate the "Flow capacity (m³/h)" control and enter "50" into the minimum value field.
Locate the price filter, enter "80000" into the maximum price field, and apply the price filter.
Click the "Apply filters" or equivalent button to update the product list.
Open the sort dropdown above the product results and select "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first product card in the sorted list (the cheapest DAF unit that meets the filters).
On the product detail page, click the "Add to quote list" button once.
Use the header icon or link for "Quote list" and click it to open the quote list page.

tasks.name: Assemble a basic treatment line for 30 m³/h within a $150,000 quote budget
tasks.description: Select one screening unit, one chemical dosing skid, and one sludge dewatering unit suitable for 30 m³/h flow, always choosing the cheapest option for each category, then adjust the quote list if the combined total exceeds $150,000 by removing the highest-priced item.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over or click "Equipment", choose "Screens & Screening", and open the screening equipment listing page.
On the screening products page, open the sort dropdown and select "Price: Low to High", then click on the first product card to choose the cheapest screen.
On the selected screen’s product page, click the "Add to quote list" button, then use the main navigation or breadcrumb to return to the "Equipment" section.
From "Equipment", navigate to "Chemical Treatment" and click on "Dosing Skids" to open the dosing skid listing page.

In the filters, set the flow or system size option to at least "30 m³/h" (or the closest available value ≥30 m³/h), then sort the list by "Price: Low to High" and click on the first product card to select the cheapest qualifying dosing skid.
On the dosing skid product page, click "Add to quote list", then return to "Equipment" and navigate to "Sludge Management" > "Dewatering" to open the sludge dewatering equipment listing.

On the dewatering listing page, set any available "Plant flow" or "Capacity" filter to at least "30 m³/h" (or the nearest higher option), sort by "Price: Low to High", and click the first product card to select the cheapest qualifying dewatering unit, then click "Add to quote list" on its detail page.

Open the quote list using the header "Quote list" link or icon, review the three items, and if the displayed total exceeds $150,000, remove the single item with the highest individual price by clicking its "Remove" or trash icon.

tasks.name: Select a maintenance plan for an MBR system in Germany with ≤24h response under €6,000/year
tasks.description: Find maintenance plans specific to Membrane Bioreactor (MBR) systems in Germany, filter to annual cost under €6,000 and response time of 24 hours or less, then add the cheapest qualifying plan to a service inquiry.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on "Services" and then select "Maintenance Plans" from the dropdown or services overview.
In the filters on the maintenance plans page, set the "Country/Region" dropdown to "Germany".
In the equipment type or application filter, select "Membrane Bioreactor (MBR) Systems".
Locate the price or "Annual cost" filter and set the maximum value to "6000" (currency set to Euros if selectable).
Find the "Response time" filter and select the option labeled "Within 24 hours" or any option indicating 24h or faster response.
Click the "Apply filters" button, then open the sort dropdown and choose "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first maintenance plan card in the filtered and sorted list (the cheapest plan that fits the criteria).
On the maintenance plan detail page, click the "Add to service inquiry" or similar button once.

tasks.name: Save a 2023 food & beverage case study treating ≥100 m³/day to the reading list
tasks.description: Filter case studies to the food & beverage industry, published in 2023 and handling at least 100 m³/day, select the most recent result, and save it to the reading list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on "Resources" and then select "Case Studies".
On the case studies page, open the "Industry" filter and select "Food & Beverage".
Use the "Year" or "Publication date" filter to select "2023".
In the "Plant capacity" or "Flow" filter, set the minimum value to "100" and the unit to "m³/day" if a unit dropdown is available.
Click the "Apply filters" button to update the case study list.
Open the sort dropdown above the results and choose "Most Recent" or "Newest First".
Click on the first case study title in the filtered and sorted list.
On the case study detail page, click the "Save to reading list" or bookmark icon once.

tasks.name: Use the sizing calculator to select an equalization tank near 750 m³ and add it to the quote list
tasks.description: Use the equalization tank sizing calculator with specified input values, then choose the recommended tank series whose calculated volume is closest to but not less than 750 m³, and add the cheapest model from that series to the quote list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on "Tools" and then select "Sizing Calculators".
On the calculators page, click the card or link labeled "Equalization Tank Sizing".
In the calculator form, enter "75" into the flow rate field and select "m³/h" from the unit dropdown if available.
Enter "2.5" into the "Peak factor" field.
Enter "4" into the "Required buffer time (hours)" or equivalent detention time field.
Click the "Calculate" button to generate sizing results.
In the results section, locate the recommended configuration whose tank volume is closest to but not less than "750 m³" and click its associated "View compatible tank series" or similar link/button.
On the recommended tank series or product listing page that opens, open the sort dropdown, choose "Price: Low to High", and click on the first product card in the list.
On that tank’s product detail page, click the "Add to quote list" button once.

tasks.name: Compare two pH neutralization systems under $40,000 and request a quote for the one with lower NaOH consumption
tasks.description: Filter pH neutralization systems to models under $40,000, select the two cheapest, compare them, and request a quote for the system with the lower NaOH consumption (kg/h).
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over or click "Equipment", then select "Chemical Treatment" followed by "pH Neutralization Systems" to open the product list.
Use the price filter to set the maximum price to "40000" and apply the filter.
Open the sort dropdown above the results and choose "Price: Low to High".
Click the first product card in the sorted list, then on its detail page click the "Add to comparison" button and return to the pH neutralization systems list using the breadcrumb or back navigation.
On the product list page, click the second product card in the same sorted list and, on its detail page, click the "Add to comparison" button.
Click the "Compare (2)" bar, button, or link that appears (usually at the bottom or top of the page) to open the comparison page for the two selected systems.
On the comparison page, identify which of the two products shows the lower numeric value in the "NaOH consumption (kg/h)" row and click the "Request quote" button associated with that product.

tasks.name: Find the nearest industrial wastewater distributor within 200 km of ZIP 75201 and view contact details
tasks.description: Use the distributor locator to search around ZIP code 75201, filter for industrial wastewater treatment distributors within 200 km, and open the contact details of the closest distributor.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on "Contact" and then select "Find a Distributor" or "Where to Buy".
In the distributor search form, type "75201" into the ZIP/postal code field.
Set the distance or radius dropdown to "200 km".
In the market or segment filter, select "Industrial Wastewater Treatment" or the closest matching option.
Click the "Search" or "Find" button to display the list of distributors.
In the results list, which should be ordered by distance, click on the first distributor name (the one shown as closest).
On the distributor detail page, click the button or link labeled "View full contact details", "Show contact info", or similar to reveal their phone and address.

tasks.name: Register for a June PFAS treatment webinar in the 10:00–12:00 time slot
tasks.description: Locate PFAS treatment webinars scheduled in June, select a session whose time falls between 10:00 and 12:00, and complete the registration form with specified details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on "Resources" and then select "Webinars & Events".
On the webinars page, open the "Topic" or "Theme" filter and select "PFAS treatment".
Use the date filter to set the month to "June" and the year to "2025" (or the closest available June in the list).
Click the "Apply filters" or equivalent button to update the webinar list.
In the filtered results, locate a webinar whose listed start time is between "10:00" and "12:00" (for example, 10:00–11:30) and click on its title to open the event detail page.
On the webinar detail page, click the "Register" or "Sign Up" button.
In the registration form, enter "Alex Rivera" into the full name field, "alex.rivera@example.com" into the email field, and "TexFab Coatings" into the company field.
In the role or job title dropdown, select "Engineering Manager", and in the country dropdown, select "United States".
Click the "Submit registration" or "Register" button to complete the signup process.
